Dr. Scholl's Shoes: Hey, this is Jordan. Thanks for checking out our site! https://drschollsshoes.attn.tv/a6gWaKryRu_C 

Can I help you find the perfect pair of shoes?
Looks like you don't have these boots in my size-5.5.

Dr. Scholl's Shoes: Yes, sorry about that! The smallest size that we currently have is 6. Our team works on providing options and variety for our customers so I'll definitely pass this along to the team to consider in the future and for future reference, keep an eye out on our website and social media, it also helps if you're signed up to our newsletter via email so you're notified with our latest deals and releases! 

Are you interested in anything else at the moment? Happy to check on the availability of it for you.
No, but thanks for passing along the info about smaller sizes to your team.

Dr. Scholl's Shoes: No worries! But I understand. Keep an eye out on out website in the future to see if we have updated sizes for out boots! Is there anything else that I can help with while I have you here?

Donna

Grunt Style: Hey there! Thanks for reaching out. Normally, the ID.me verification should pop up in the cart or during checkout where you enter your payment details. If you're not seeing it there, it might be because of your browser settings or something specific to the verification process.

First I might suggest trying a different internet browser, as certain ones have issues with e-commerce stores. Let me know how that goes.

If that doesn't work, could you snap a screenshot of what you're seeing on your screen? I'll take a look and see what I can do to sort this out for you!
Thanks a bunch !
Grunt Style: My pleasure! Is there anything else that I can help with while I have you here?
Good for now's  , yjamkd
good for now, thanks
Grunt Style: No problem! Feel free to reach out anytime, I'm always here to help! In the meantime, you may check out our new arrivals here: https://gruntstyle.attn.tv/avKZH45_DBat
This is my checkout screen shot

Grunt Style: Thanks for sending the pic. If possible, can you please try using a different browser or device to see if that does the trick? Perhaps use a PC or laptop, and use Google Chrome.

coupons.description: 10% off apparel orders only *DOES NOT APPLY TO FOOTWEAR*

send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately for post-purchase issues
Send to CS for payment processing issues
tone: Don't tell customers that we'll be restocking
Close the conversation when a customer responds 'no'
templates: If a cx reaches out regarding the Early Access event, use EAE shortcut
For cx reaching out in Spanish use SSC shortcut
For checkout issues use the "Check out Issues" temp
For store item availability, use SPA shortcut
If cx's email doesn't work for early access, use EEA shortcut
dos_and_donts: They occasionally run sign-up campaigns where cx text certain keywords (“releases,” “early access”) to join a list. If a customer sends a similar keyword:
➜ Check the website banner or landing page to confirm if it's a current keyword trigger
➜ If confirmed, close the convo, if not you can respond
All clothing is true to size unless otherwise stated on the product page
You can use these sizing charts for reference (for internal use only): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kmra_vOwCJuHoAx9D4L4Qx95rxafHcrqn-ZGutfzLgg/edit?usp=sharing
🅿️ If customers say they want to purchase in store - encourage them to buy online & pick up in-store
For store info q's (phone number/additional info) - use the store locator with your VPN turned on!
drive_to_purchase: 🅿️ If customers are looking for an outfit recommendation/item pairing - direct them to the "shop the look" section on each product page or use the LK shortcut
